primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2021 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Management of Blood Pressure in Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive evidence-based recommendations for BP targets and antihypertensive therapy in CKD patients

primary_sources.name: KDOQI Clinical Practice Guideline for Cardiovascular Disease in Dialysis Patients
primary_sources.relevance: Specific guidance for blood pressure management in dialysis patients

primary_sources.name: 2017 ACC/AHA/AAPA/ABC/ACPM/AGS/APhA/ASH/ASPC/NMA/PCNA Guideline for the Prevention, Detection, Evaluation, and Management of High Blood Pressure in Adults
primary_sources.relevance: General hypertension management with specific CKD considerations and ABPM recommendations

primary_sources.name: Kidney International Supplements - KDIGO BP in CKD Guideline
primary_sources.relevance: Full scientific rationale and evidence review supporting KDIGO BP recommendations

secondary_sources.name: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline for the Care of Kidney Transplant Recipients

gaps: Updated post-transplant hypertension guidelines (KDIGO 2009 needs revision)
Specific resistant hypertension protocols in CKD patients
